data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for a room scan (360 camera view) as part of the proctored exam process. However, the evidence does not include any specific API reads or checks that confirm the implementation of this requirement. The linked use case mentions the room scan requirement but lacks concrete evidence or details on how this is executed, leading to a clear gap in the requirement satisfaction.
gaps: No evidence of implementation for the room scan requirement (360 camera view).

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add evidence for room scan implementation
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify that the room scan requirement is implemented and functioning as specified.
